name: tmux-team
description: Pane-visible agent team orchestration with tmux, durable inboxes, and runtime-native wake delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Start and operate pane-visible agent teams
interface.longDescription: Bootstraps tmux-visible Codex or external ACP TUI teams with durable inbox state and runtime-native wake delivery, avoiding tmux prompt injection.
defaultPrompt: Start a tmux-team for this repo.
Coordinate implementer and collector roles for this task.
Show tmux-team status and pending inbox work.
